summary: Critical: actions/checkout@v4 NOT pinned to commit SHA—violates core YAML hardening. Script's awk-based JSON parsing (extract_deps lines ~75-90, read_array_from_config ~55-85) lacks schema validation; silent failures on malformed input. Workflow references fixtures (fixtures/*.json, *.tsv) without creating them—tests cannot run through act without fixture setup. classify() uses case-sensitive grep -xF, missing edge cases (e.g. 'MIT' vs 'mit'). No validation that manifest extraction succeeded before processing.
